scenarios.id: Match3 - Match fixed length patterns-[15] Mixing directed and undirected pattern parts with self-relationship, simple
scenarios.description: [15] Mixing directed and undirected pattern parts with self-relationship, simple
scenarios.query:
MATCH (x:A)-[r1]->(y)-[r2]-(z)
RETURN x, r1, y, r2, z

RETURN x, r1, y, r2, z

scenarios.id: Match3 - Match fixed length patterns-[22] Returning bound nodes that are not part of the pattern
scenarios.description: [22] Returning bound nodes that are not part of the pattern
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a {name: 'A'}), (c {name: 'C'})
MATCH (a)-->(b)
RETURN a, b, c
scenarios.skip_reason: engine: multiple MATCH without WITH not supported

scenarios.id: Match3 - Match fixed length patterns-[23] Matching disconnected patterns
scenarios.description: [23] Matching disconnected patterns
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a)-->(b)
MATCH (c)-->(d)
RETURN a, b, c, d
scenarios.skip_reason: engine: multiple MATCH without WITH not supported

scenarios.id: Match3 - Match fixed length patterns-[24] Matching twice with duplicate relationship types on same relationship
scenarios.description: [24] Matching twice with duplicate relationship types on same relationship
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a1)-[r:T]->()
WITH r, a1
MATCH (a1)-[r:T]->(b2)
RETURN a1, r, b2
scenarios.skip_reason: engine: WITH clause in pipeline not fully supported

scenarios.id: Match3 - Match fixed length patterns-[25] Matching twice with an additional node label
scenarios.description: [25] Matching twice with an additional node label
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a1)-[r]->()
WITH r, a1
MATCH (a1:X)-[r]->(b2)
RETURN a1, r, b2
scenarios.skip_reason: engine: WITH clause in pipeline not fully supported

scenarios.id: Match3 - Match fixed length patterns-[26] Matching twice with a duplicate predicate
scenarios.description: [26] Matching twice with a duplicate predicate
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a1:X:Y)-[r]->()
WITH r, a1
MATCH (a1:Y)-[r]->(b2)
RETURN a1, r, b2
scenarios.skip_reason: engine: WITH clause in pipeline not fully supported

scenarios.id: Match3 - Match fixed length patterns-[27] Matching from null nodes should return no results owing to finding no matches
scenarios.description: [27] Matching from null nodes should return no results owing to finding no matches
scenarios.query:
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)
WITH a
MATCH (a)-->(b)
RETURN b
scenarios.skip_reason: binder: OPTIONAL MATCH not yet supported

scenarios.id: Match3 - Match fixed length patterns-[28] Matching from null nodes should return no results owing to matches being filtered out
scenarios.description: [28] Matching from null nodes should return no results owing to matches being filtered out
scenarios.query:
OPTIONAL MATCH (a:TheLabel)
WITH a
MATCH (a)-->(b)
RETURN b
scenarios.skip_reason: binder: OPTIONAL MATCH not yet supported

scenarios.id: Match3 - Match fixed length patterns-[29] Fail when re-using a relationship in the same pattern
scenarios.description: [29] Fail when re-using a relationship in the same pattern
scenarios.skip_reason: checker: semantic error detection not yet implemented

scenarios.id: Match3 - Match fixed length patterns-[30] Fail when using a list or nodes as a node
scenarios.description: [30] Fail when using a list or nodes as a node
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
WITH [n] AS users
MATCH (users)-->(messages)
RETURN messages
scenarios.skip_reason: engine: WITH clause in pipeline not fully supported
